name: none
description: Use this when the instruction does not match any other command, is unclear, or is not a CAD manipulation. Put a short explanation in "reason". TR: anlasilmayan veya desteklenmeyen istekler icin.
examples: bugun hava nasil -> {"command":"none","params":{"reason":"not a CAD command"}}

params.name: reason
params.note: short reason why no command applies
